text:
Created attachment 165135
p5-URI-db-0.16.shar

This is a dependency of p5-App-Sqitch, which I've submitted in bug #205943. This depends on p5-DB-Nested, which isn't in the ports tree yet. I'll submit another bug for that and I'll link to that once it's opened, should happen in the next few minutes.
